code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
std::string get_target_for_redirect(const std::string& target, const std::string& domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided later (but declare it here so you can use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to generate a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temporary file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.

Yenza i-DSE eyimfihlo, uyithumele usebenzisa ifomathi ye-PEM, kwaye uyibuyisele njengentambo.
Iingcebiso: sebenzisa imiyalelo yesikhumbuzo ukwenza ifayile yeparam ye-DSA kunye ne-DSE eyimfihlo njengoko kulandelayo:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <ifayile yesikhashana yokugcina iiparam> <ubude_bokhi>`
2. `openssl gendsa <ifayile yesikhashana yokugcina iiparam>`
Ungasebenzisa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` ukwenza igama lefayile yesikhashana eyahlukileyo yeparam ye-DSA.

@return I-DSE eyimfihlo eyenziwe kwi-fomathi ye-PEM, okanye NULL ukuba kwenzeke impazamo.

prompts_en: Function to pad data to AES block size
fw_segments_by_variant: Umsebenzi wokufaka idatha kwi-AES block size

Cwangcisa idatha nge key usebenzisa i-CBC mode.
I-byte ye-key enikeziweyo inobude obaneleyo (>= 64 bytes) kwiinkqubo ezikhoyo. Khetha kuphela enye inkqubo yokuphumeza kwaye usebenzise umphambili we-byte ye-key enikeziweyo efanelekileyo ubude obufunekayo. Ungakhethi inkqubo ngokusekelwe kubude be-key.
Buyisela idatha efakwe, i-IV (initialization vector), kunye ne-key esetyenziswe kwi-encryption.
Umsebenzi wokufaka idatha kwi-AES block size

Cima idatha ngelungelo usebenzisa i-CBC mode.
I-byte ye-key enikeziweyo inobude obaneleyo (>= 64 bytes) kwiindlela ezikhoyo. Khetha indlela enye kuphela yokuphumeza kwaye usebenzise umphambili we-byte ye-key enikeziweyo efanelekileyo nobude obufunekayo. Ungakhethi indlela ngokobude be-key.
Buyisela idatha efakwe, i-IV (initialization vector), kunye nelungelo elisetyenzisiweyo kwi-encryption.
Umsebenzi wokufaka idatha kwi-AES block size

Cima idatha nge-key usebenzisa i-CBC mode.
I-byte ye-key enikeziweyo inobude obaneleyo (>= 64 bytes) kwiinkqubo ezikhoyo. Khetha kuphela enye inkqubo yokuphumeza kwaye usebenzise umphambili we-byte ye-key enikeziweyo efanelekileyo ubude obufunekayo. Ungakhethi inkqubo ngokubhekisele kubude be-key.
Buyisela idatha efakwe, i-IV (initialization vector), kunye ne-key esetyenziswe kwi-encryption.

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A map containing student information (name, age, citizenship) if found, otherwise an empty map.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Faka idatha ye-XML kwaye ubuyise ulwazi lomfundi olufumaneka ngegama lomsebenzisi kunye nephasiwedi. Idatha ye-XML iya kuba nesakhiwo esilandelayo:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

@param password Iphasiwedi yomfundi ofunwa.

@return Imephu equlethe ulwazi lomfundi (igama, ubudala, ubuzwe) ukuba ifunyenwe, kungenjalo imephu engenanto.
